upasargachandrika.example_text: 'etadDa devA BUyaH samAmire taTo evEtat samamanta' (Sa॰brA॰3.4.2.13) samamanta=EkamatyamAnaSira ityarTaH
'saMvatsarAya vA etO samamAte' (tE0 saM0 2262) samamAte SapaTaM kurvAte etasminvizaye'nyonyamAvAByAM na drogDavyamiti amAte ityatrAtmanepadamArzam
